prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Using the current price of $139.51, a time horizon of 18 trading days (approximately 0.0714 years), an estimated annualized volatility (sigma) of 35% for QCOM, and an annualized drift (mu) of 5%, the future price distribution was modeled. The point estimate represents the expected mean price, and the confidence intervals are derived from the quantiles of this log-normal distribution. The parameters used are general estimates for illustrative purposes.
